problem: In $\triangle ABC$, $\angle ABC = 90^\circ$ and $BA = BC = \sqrt{2}$. Points $P_1, P_2, \ldots, P_{2024}$ lie on hypotenuse $\overline{AC}$ so that $AP_1 = P_1P_2 = \cdots = P_{2023}P_{2024} = P_{2024}C$. What is the length of the vector sum $\overrightarrow{BP_1} + \overrightarrow{BP_2} + \cdots + \overrightarrow{BP_{2024}}$?
